---
title: "Katharine Frances Baker Wilbraham"
---

## Katharine Frances Baker Wilbraham

**Dates:** (1849/51-1945)

**Maiden name:** (Wilbraham), Lady

### Description

daughter of General Sir Richard Wilbraham

### Biography

She married (4 April 1872) George Barrington Baker (1845–1912), who succeeded his father as 5th Bt. in 1912.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 17th [1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
